title: depou #1222
definition:
1) it is used when something is affirmed in a slightly ironical
    manner, as if with an pretence of uncertainty
    1a) perhaps
    1b) doubtless
    1c) verily
    1d) truly
nasbUsage:

    manner, as if with an pretence of uncertainty
    1a) perhaps
